input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the vehicle must stay below the permitted sound level at all times  in.10.5

final_answer: The vehicle must stay below the permitted sound level at all times
